tasks.label: Preview Fund Console
tasks.detail: Start Live Server (needs ritwickdey.liveserver) on http://127.0.0.1:5501
tasks.command: echo Live Server starting on http://127.0.0.1:5501/fund-console.html ${command:extension.liveServer.goOnline}

tasks.label: Serve (no extension)
tasks.detail: Zero-dependency fallback: node serve.mjs on http://127.0.0.1:5501 with live reload
